name: github_create_branch
description: Create a new branch in a GitHub repository from an existing branch, tag, or commit SHA. IMPORTANT: You must first get the SHA of the source branch using github_list_branches or github_read_commits, then use that SHA here. The branch will be created as a reference pointing to the specified commit.

ref.description: The full reference name for the new branch. MUST be in format 'refs/heads/BRANCH_NAME'. Example: if you want to create branch 'feature/my-feature', use 'refs/heads/feature/my-feature'.

sha.description: The SHA1 commit hash that the new branch will point to. REQUIRED: First call github_list_branches to get the SHA of your source branch (like 'main'), then use that SHA here.

workflow: STEP 1: Call github_list_branches to get SHA of source branch. STEP 2: Call github_create_branch with that SHA and your new branch name in refs/heads/ format.

examples.name: Create a new branch from main
examples.description: After getting main branch SHA from github_list_branches
